title: Internal error when task is used to assign subscripted vector

features.name: task output assigned via procedural assign
features.description: Code should include a task with an output parameter that is assigned using a procedural assign statement (not blocking/non-blocking assignment)

features.name: task call with subscripted vector argument
features.description: Code should include a task call where an argument is a vector element accessed using a variable subscript index

features.name: task output param passed to unpacked array subscript
features.description: Code should include a task with an output parameter passed an unpacked array element where the subscript is a variable
